questions.question: Minimum time to count frequencies of n elements?
Best Python structure for counting frequencies?
Space for frequency map of n distinct elements?
questions.explanation: Each distinct element gets a key-value pair.

questions.question: Find majority element with frequency map?
choices: O(n log n) time, O(1) space
questions.explanation: Iterate once (O(n) time), store up to n entries (O(n) space).

questions.question: When use frequency map vs manual counting?
choices: When need counts for ALL elements
questions.explanation: Frequency maps give counts for every element simultaneously.
